## Data

- Dataset source and license.
- Sampling recipe.
- Tokenizer.

- Megatron path and commit.
- Model size arguments.
- Batch/global batch/sequence length.
- Precision and backend settings.
- Environment path.
- Slurm partition, GPU type, memory, and time limit.
